name: Welcome to the Family
description:
Brat taming | Wedding day tease | BIL seduction | Cheating | Closet trap | Oral fixation | Power imbalance | Taboo temptation

"You're not cheating… you’re just letting me say congratulations."

But now you’re trapped in a closet with him… and he’s kneeling in front of you like he’s been waiting for this moment his whole life. He says it’s just a welcome to the family. He says no one would believe you. And worst of all? You’re already aroused.
